programmes.show_description: Carry On-style comedy curio. A divorced man teaches girls how to swindle rich men - and in return he gets a cut of their takings. Contains nudity and 60s social attitudes.
Simon Templar is on holiday in Naples when he intervenes between an arguing Englishman and Italian. So begins his investigation into mafia crime. Roger Moore stars.
Former police officer, Aaron Carty, swapped his uniform for high heels to perform as Beyonce at UK Black Pride
6/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler battle it out to make the most money. Roo Irvine, Gary Barton and Kevin Paxton head to St Andrews.

22/35. Charlie and Chris are in Shropshire to create an accessible, Italian-inspired garden for Denise and ex-professional footballer John.
1/4. A five-diamond platinum sparkler, Italian marble chimney piece and Tibetan dagger go under the hammer. Will a guitar signed by The Rolling Stones give someone satisfaction?
2/4. A 19th-century Japanese silver punchbowl, a boule table and a John Constable painting go under the hammer. And will a 1930s Philco radio make a sound profit?
3/4. An Egyptian amulet, a silver pin cushion and a collection of timepieces make the auction tick. And will someone be sitting pretty on some Louis XVI gilt chairs?
4/4. A Victorian mirror and some acclaimed works of art go under the hammer. And will an extremely collectable consignment of wine get the auction's juices flowing? Last in series.
A German undercover unit infiltrates British lines during the Dunkirk evacuation. Their mission - sabotage the RAF during the Battle of Britain. Boo! Stars Frederick Stafford.
During the 1922 Turkish Civil War, two American adventurers and a band of mercenaries guard a covert transport through hostile territory. Tony Curtis and Charles Bronson star.
Comedy. A despondent man hires a professional assassin to take himself out. Stars David Jason and Monty Python's Graham Chapman.
Helen Mirren stars as a sex worker who begins an affair with a shady colleague at their high-class London cabaret. Can their relationship survive? Contains sexual scenes.
Four satirical tales of hapless men - who should know better - getting into extra-marital affairs. Reflects early 70s attitudes and contains sexual scenes.
A German undercover unit infiltrates British lines during the Dunkirk evacuation. Their mission - sabotage the RAF during the Battle of Britain. Boo! Stars Frederick Stafford.
7/20. An antiques expert, a market trader and an upcycler battle it out to make the most money. Kate Bliss, Danny Sebastian and Stu Abbott head to Ludlow.

23/35. Charlie and Chris are in Stoke-on-Trent to design a safe and practical garden for Doris and her daughter Petra, inspired by the German meadows that surrounded Doris's childhood home.
Our Land is the story of two black food growers who refuse to be held back by barriers of race, class, or land injustice. A film supported and funded by Together TV.
Tonia is on her ancestral homeland of Cyprus. There she visits a goat farm to help milk some lively goats and to see how traditional halloumi cheese is made.(S1/E1)
Two archaeologists and a historian try Edwardian life for a year. They prepare for the arrival of their first livestock, and historian Ruth Goodman cooks a sheep's head stew.
6/8. An art forger's work is up for auction. Plus: Leeds football programme from 1904, a taxidermy unicorn and a set of drums from the 1970s.
Tonia is on her ancestral homeland of Cyprus. There she visits a goat farm to help milk some lively goats and to see how traditional halloumi cheese is made.(S1/E1)
Tonia travels to Mykonos, one of the chicest resorts in Greece. There she cooks red mullet parcels, and baklava - a traditional sweet Greek dessert made with nuts and honey. (S1/E2)
6/8. Explaining the difference between 'use by', 'best before' and 'display until,' the safety of supermarket pork and the challenges facing Scottish salmon.
Two archaeologists and a historian try Edwardian life for a year. They prepare for the arrival of their first livestock, and historian Ruth Goodman cooks a sheep's head stew.
1/10. Marcus Wareing adopts a slower-paced life at his Sussex smallholding. He brings in new pigs, shares his bounty with the locals and cooks up a feast
Four children compete in two crafty upcycling challenges, working with recycled metal. Only two will make it through to the semi-finals of 'Crafty Champions'

6/8. An art forger's work is up for auction. Plus: Leeds football programme from 1904, a taxidermy unicorn and a set of drums from the 1970s.
Stories of people who have experienced infidelity, the reasons why people stray outside their relationship and if a relationship can ever survive.
Four children compete in two crafty upcycling challenges, working with recycled metal. Only two will make it through to the semi-finals of 'Crafty Champions'
Shiva Raichandani's film follows Asifa as she prepares to undergo gender affirmation surgery. The trans activist reflects on how her life has changed during her transition
Lockdown wreaked havoc on our sex lives...some went without and some got naughty. Anna Richardson dives under the covers to investigate.
